changelog: Fixed a stray Reset to Default trigger re-firing when the SSH addon restarts. The reset watcher only runs while that addon is up; a click queued right as it stops (e.g. during the previous cycle's own lockdown step) sat unconsumed until the addon was next started, at which point it fired immediately -- even minutes later, with no relation to a fresh click. The watcher now discards any trigger older than 1 minute instead of blindly acting on it. Also fixed the watcher-update mechanism to replace an outdated watcher on already-provisioned devices, not just add one to brand-new devices.
